description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from thick, horizontally stacked wooden logs, giving it a robust and traditional appearance. The roof is a simple gable style, made from wooden planks, with a prominent chimney emerging from one side. The front features a small, uncovered porch supported by four wooden posts, and a single door is set into the log wall. On each side of the cabin, there are rectangular windows with a grid pattern, framed in wood and painted a light yellow, providing a touch of contrast to the dark brown logs. The cabin is elevated slightly above the ground, supported by short log stilts, and a wooden walkway leads up to the porch. The overall design is compact and functional, evoking a classic log cabin aesthetic suitable for rural or park-like urban settings.
description: A compact, rustic log cabin with a gable roof, chimney, small porch, and grid-patterned windows, all constructed from dark brown wood. The cabin is elevated on short stilts and features a wooden walkway leading to the front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the small porch, centered door, and the walkway leading up to the entrance, with the gable roof and chimney visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular, grid-patterned window and the extension of the porch and walkway, with the chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid log wall with no windows or doors, and the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another rectangular window and the continuation of the porch and walkway structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, constructed from wooden planks and featuring a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows with grid patterns, symmetrically placed on each side wall of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto the porch and walkway
